# HoloWeights
> Virtual volumetric, memory-mapped representation of neural network weights (digital stacks, not optics hardware).

## Project
- https://github.com/mprahboamey/holoweights

## Main docs
- https://github.com/mprahboamey/holoweights/blob/main/README.md
- https://github.com/mprahboamey/holoweights/blob/main/METHOD.md
- https://github.com/mprahboamey/holoweights/blob/main/THEORY.md
- https://github.com/mprahboamey/holoweights/blob/main/CLAIMS.md

- Personal GitHub: https://github.com/mprahboamey
